nextPhaseDescription: The next round should focus on completing the remaining parts of Phase 2 and Phase 3. Specifically, implement the PDF generation using PDFKit, create seed data files in JSON format, and set up SQLite for data storage. Additionally, ensure the UI can communicate with the backend via defined API endpoints and integrate with the FreshBooks API to fetch invoice data. Begin work on Phase 4 by conducting unit, integration, and manual testing to ensure functionality and optimize performance.
